research.target_problem: Unsupported claims in generated scientific reports
research.intended_claim: Explicit claim-support scoring reduces unsupported claims at fixed cost
research.observed_problem: The frozen baseline can retain weakly supported claims
research.proposed_mechanism: The baseline does not explicitly calibrate support for each claim

hypothesis.condition: When retrieved evidence is sparse or conflicting
hypothesis.limitation: The baseline accepts some weakly supported claims
hypothesis.mechanism: Claim support is not explicitly calibrated before report acceptance
hypothesis.intervention: Add a calibrated claim-support scorer before the quality gate
hypothesis.predicted_metric_change: Unsupported-claim rate decreases relative to the frozen baseline
hypothesis.guardrail: Task success and citation coverage do not decrease by more than two percentage points

modules.name: support-scorer
modules.proposed_role: Per-claim support scoring before report acceptance
modules.input_semantics: Ordered claim and verified-evidence feature sequence
modules.output_semantics: Calibrated support probability for every report claim
modules.masks: Mask padded claims and missing evidence
modules.ordering: Preserve claim order from the final-report schema
modules.compute_cost: Less than ten percent of baseline latency
assumptions: Evidence identifiers have passed deterministic verification
modules.predicted_effect: Reduce unsupported claims without reducing citation coverage

experiments.name: baseline
experiments.stopping_criteria: Stop after the fixed tuning budget

experiments.name: full
experiments.stopping_criteria: Stop after the fixed tuning budget

experiments.name: support-only
experiments.stopping_criteria: Stop after the fixed tuning budget

evidence.title: Frozen baseline implementation and reproduction record
limitations: Evaluated on one frozen development corpus

stop_conditions: Stop if the baseline cannot be reproduced
Stop if citation coverage falls by more than two percentage points
Stop if the module license or evidence provenance becomes invalid
